signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 | NO | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's inflation rate increased to 2.2% year-on-year in March 2026 from 2.0% in the prior two months, missing market forecasts of 2.4% but signaling a shift amid Middle East tensions driving energy prices higher[2][1].
